arts.ttl: Arsenal vs West Ham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal can cut the gap on leaders Liverpool to five points with a win against West Ham this weekend. Mikel Arteta’s team host their London rivals at the Emirates on Saturday. After Liverpool dropped points in midweek, the Gunners will want to increase the pressure on the table-toppers, who face Manchester City in a crunch […] The post Arsenal vs West Ham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face Premier League title race nightmare after shock Liverpool scenario revealed
arts.sum: If Arsenal and Liverpool make their way through the newly structured Champions League then they will play three times in the space of just 12 days. With Liverpool's treble currently still on the cards - although they will have already played Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup final by the time Arsenal face them next so will know just what the lay of the land is at that stage - and Arteta pining for an unlikely double, there is much at stake.

arts.ttl: West Ham striker Michail Antonio 'is back running' less than three months after car crash which broke his leg and left him fearing for his life
arts.sum: On December 7, Antonio, 34, was airlifted to hospital with a broken leg after being cut from the wreckage of his £260,000 grey Ferrari by fire crews in Essex.

arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to close the gap at the top of the table to five points when they welcome London rivals West Ham to the Emirates Stadium in the Premier League today. Ahead of the game, we’v...

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Return of Ben White leaves Mikel Arteta with selection dilemma he needs more of
arts.sum: Competition between White and Jurrien Timber is the kind Arteta could do with elsewhere in his squad

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta eyes Jorginho replacement as Arsenal set to revist transfer
arts.sum: Fichajes claims that Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi will be one of Arsenal's top targets this summer - as the Gunners look to steal a march on Liverpool and sign the Spain international. Zubimendi was close to moving to Anfield last summer as Liverpool looked set to trigger the £51m release clause in his Sociedad before the player turned down a move to Merseyside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta calls up teenage forward inspired by Sadio Mane to Arsenal training pre-West Ham

arts.ttl: Premier League title race: Can Liverpool hold off Arsenal after Arne Slot's team drew against Aston Villa, Everton?
arts.sum: Liverpool's two draws in their last three Premier League games has led to some concern that they could lose out on the title to rivals Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without five players for West Ham amid Bukayo Saka hope
arts.sum: That means, when looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 senior players available for selection for the game vs West Ham. As per Premier League rules, a club is allowed to name a squad of 20 players for a Premier League match. Arsenal know that a win over West Ham will put huge pressure on Liverpool in the Premier League title race.
